div1.entryFree:
Comforter, 1) he who, or that which brings solace: it (sleep) seldom visits sorrow; when it doth, it is a c. Tp. II, 1, 196. a solemn air and the best c. to an unsettled fancy, V, 58. let no c. delight mine ear, Ado V, 1, 6. to be your c. when he is gone, R3 I, 3, 10.
2) cheerer: (the sun) the world's c. Ven. 529.
